# P4 figures inventory (Round-5 R5-N2 hygiene)

This directory contains 33 PDF figures. The P4 manuscript currently
cites 28 of them via `\includegraphics{figures/...}`. The remaining
**11 figures** are auto-generated by the figure-pipeline scripts
(`src/make_figures.py`, `src/make_signed_halo_figures.py`, etc.)
but are NOT cited by the current manuscript text:

| Figure file | Status | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| fig10_galerkin_per_node_full.pdf | supplementary | per-node Galerkin Frobenius scatter; superseded by cited fig9 |
| fig11_runner_A_hessian_ricci.pdf | supplementary | Runner-A Hessian-Ricci 9-pt; the cited summary is in fig8 |
| fig12_within_regime_p5.pdf | supplementary | within-P5 5-pt fit; cited variant is fig7 |
| fig13_heavy_tail_t00.pdf | supplementary | T_00 heavy-tail histogram; superseded |
| fig14_heavy_tail_clusters.pdf | supplementary | T_00 cluster scatter; superseded |
| fig15_geometric_condensation_evidence.pdf | supplementary | geometric condensation per Lemma B; alternative figure |
| fig16_b2a1a3_significance.pdf | supplementary | B2/A1/A3 significance bars; alt to cited summary |
| fig_3d_halo_around_defect.pdf | supplementary | 3D halo render; alt visualisation |
| fig_m3_defect_quantitative.pdf | supplementary | M3 defect quantitative; superseded |
| fig_nfw_halo_profile.pdf | supplementary | NFW halo profile; cited in P4-B not P4 |
| fig_signed_balance_vs_N.pdf | supplementary | signed-balance vs N; cited in P4-B |

These files are intentionally retained on disk because:
1. The make_figures pipeline produces them deterministically and they
   serve as reproducibility artefacts (regenerable from the bundled
   data via the figure scripts).
2. Some are alternative visualisations that may be promoted to
   manuscript citations in a future revision; deleting them prematurely
   would lose reproducible-from-source state.
3. The corresponding cited variants in the current manuscript carry
   the load-bearing role; the supplementary figures provide additional
   diagnostic views available via the make_figures pipeline.

To prune the supplementary list: edit `src/make_figures.py` to skip
the figures listed as "supplementary" above, then delete the PDF files.
To promote a supplementary figure to cited: add the corresponding
`\includegraphics{figures/<name>}` block to `paper/manuscript.tex`
with appropriate caption.
